Own-year report. LAST year this table appears in any of the 23 reports held -- confirmed by grep for 'EXPORT OF CRUDE OIL' / 'Export of Crude Oil' across all 23 plain-text extractions: zero hits in any FY1381-1401 report. CBI's own published oil-export VOLUME series stops here even though oil export REVENUE (via the Balance of Payments table) continues to be published every subsequent year through FY1401. Genuine source gap, not a project omission.
